headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on NetApp, Raises Price Target to $114
summary: Citigroup  analyst Asiya Merchant   maintains NetApp (NASDAQ:NTAP) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $110 to $114.

headline: Don't Overlook NetApp (NTAP) International Revenue Trends While Assessing the Stock
summary: Examine NetApp's (NTAP) international revenue patterns and their implications on Wall Street's forecasts and the prospective trajectory of the stock.
